# Notes: 'StepUp.One Daily Learning' 11 May 2026

Auto-generated Gemini meeting notes from two sessions on 11 May 2026.

---

## Session 1 — Morning (auto-generated 10:59 AM BST)

### Summary

Team analysis identified insufficient context for AI queries and optimized outreach strategies for fractional CXO engagement.

### Optimizing AI Context Usage

The team identified that poor AI performance stemmed from failing to provide full sender, client, and conversation history. Success requires inputting these 3 specific contexts before querying the AI.

### Refining Sales Outreach Strategy

The team decided to replace transactional hard sells with a collaborative approach. The primary strategy shift is asking prospective clients for their expert feedback on prototypes to foster buy-in.

### Operational and Skill Focus

Members were instructed to utilize correct accounts for client data downloads to prevent credit exhaustion. The team also discussed prioritizing critical thinking as an essential future survival skill.

### Suggested Next Steps

- [Ahmed, Patience Ciza, Sharmmug] Practice the new sales technique for the next 2 to 3 days. Test the results achieved using this new method.
- [Mohamed Anis] Fix the problem that is coming related to current issues.
- [Yasin Abdille] Check Karen's account to verify if Sales Navigator is enabled.
- [AHMED FARHAN] Confirm with Jeff Lean whether he has the price model details.
- [Mohamed Anis] Chat with the former client Bilal regarding fundraising help.
- [Patience Ciza] Call up Levine to follow up on the sales interaction.

## Session 2 — Afternoon (auto-generated 2:15 PM BST)

### Summary

Team discussion on AI studio onboarding and outreach strategies for fractional CXO client engagement and communication.

### Onboarding and AI Tools

Team members reviewed LinkedIn and email access requirements for new hires. The team officially transitioned to using AI studio for content generation.

### AI Studio Workflow Optimization

The team aligned on selecting the middle Haiku setting to control costs during content generation. Standardized short messaging strategies were adopted for all outbound fractional CXO outreach.

### Engagement and Program Updates

Participants tested AI comment generation features for thought leadership and traffic driving. Engagement in team sessions and the Gambella digital program was emphasized.
